response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified two distinct songs based on on-screen text: 'Steppin' out' and '[A]ddiction'.
2. Used the provided search template for both: '"Steppin' out" FLOW Japanese and English lyrics' and '"Addiction" Giga Japanese and English lyrics'.
3. Extracted primary artist names (FLOW for 'Steppin' out', Giga for 'Addiction') based on the on-screen credits.
4. Identified performers as Hololive EN members (Baelz, Kronii, IRyS for the first, Baelz for the second).
5. Mapped the scenes based on music/visual changes.
6. Formatted the output as a clean JSON object.
response.global_summary: A 2-song medley featuring Hololive EN talents Hakos Baelz, Ouro Kronii, and IRyS. The first song is 'Steppin' out' from the anime Durarara!!x2 Ketsu, followed by a solo performance of '[A]ddiction' by Hakos Baelz.

scenes.description: Introduction of the characters (Baelz, IRyS, Kronii) posing on a stage.
Characters perform 'Steppin' out' with on-screen text identifying the song and its creators.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:

異常なほどの刺激を 待ち望んでいたのかな
ちょっとしたそんな冒険心は 改札に吸い込まれて
吐き出され辿り着いた 雨降るこの街
何も感じれないまま 死んでいくのはごめんだ
終わりのその先をめざして
駆け出せ steppin' out tonight
僕らは不確かなまま
輝く steppin' out tonight
待ってるんだぜ明日が
抗え steppin' out tonight
僕らは風の中
それでも steppin' out tonight
追いかけてんだ So there's no looking back
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Please destroy these common days of mine
I must have been waiting for the stimulation of something abnormal
That tiny bit of adventurousness got sucked into observation
After being spit back out I arrived in this rainy city
I ain't gonna die having never felt anything
So I'll set my sights beyond the end
Kakedase steppin' out tonight
We're still so uncertain
Kagayaku steppin' out tonight
Tomorrow is waiting for us
Aragae steppin' out tonight
We're amid the wind
Soredemo steppin' out tonight
We're chasing after it, so there's no looking back

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Don't take your love away
You ain't heard nothin' yet

There's still some affection leftover, aww, this again
Selfishness
